zh.lifeSummary: 當Lettice Peniston於1485年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾霍利其時，她的父親Sir Thomas Peniston39歲，母親Alice Bulstrode35歲。她於大約1500年與Robert Lee結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1558年6月11日之前在英國越可爾洛維爾，埋葬在英國越可爾素斯 可洛曼德霍利 特利尼迪 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lettice Peniston于1485年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾霍利其时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Peniston39岁，母亲Alice Bulstrode35岁。她于大约1500年与Robert Lee结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1558年6月11日之前在英国越可爾洛維爾，埋葬在英国越可爾素斯 可洛曼德霍利 特利尼迪 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Peniston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from Penistone near Sheffield (Yorkshire), or, less likely, Penistone in Stainmore (Cumbria). The Yorkshire placename is of uncertain etymology, but may derive from Proto-Welsh penn ‘head’ + the Old English placename forming suffix -ing (genitive -inges) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The etymology of the Cumbrian placename is uncertain.

nameMeanings.name: Lettice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the medieval vernacular form of the Latin name   Laetitia .  It was in use in Britain in the Middle Ages, but then fell out of use until revived by the Victorians. It is now once again out of fashion.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Lettice Peniston was born in 1485, in Hawridge, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Sir Thomas Peniston, was 39 and her mother, Alice Bulstrode, was 35. She married Robert Lee about 1500. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died before 11 June 1558, in Rothwell, Yorkshire, England, and was buried in Holy Trinity Churchyard, South Crosland, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lettice Peniston est née en 1485, à Hawridge, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Peniston, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Alice Bulstrode, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Lee environ 1500. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 11 juin 1558, à Rothwell, Everwyck, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Holy Trinity Churchyard, South Crosland, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lettice Peniston 1485 in Hawridge, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Peniston 39 und ihre Mutter Alice Bulstrode 35. Juni 1558 in Rothwell, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Holy Trinity Churchyard, South Crosland, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lettice Peniston è nata il nel 1485 nel Hawridge, Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Peniston, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Alice Bulstrode, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Robert Lee circa 1500. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 11 giugno 1558, nel Rothwell, Yorkshire, England, e fu sepolta a Holy Trinity Churchyard, South Crosland, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lettice Penistonが1485年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアハウリッジで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Penistonは39歳，母Alice Bulstrodeは35歳であった。約1500年にRobert Leeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1558年6月11日以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアロスウエルで死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアソウス クロスランドホーリー トリニトイ チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.Holy Trinity Churchyard, South Crosland,: 영국 요르크실르 소우스 크로슬랜드 홀이 트리니티 c후르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Lettice Peniston(이)가 1485년 영국 벅잉함실르 호리지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Peniston(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Bulstrode(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 대략 1500년 Robert Lee(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1558년 6월 11일 이전 영국 요르크실르 로스웰에서 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 소우스 크로슬랜드 홀이 트리니티 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lettice Peniston nasceu em 1485, em Hawridge, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Peniston, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Alice Bulstrode, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Lee aproximadamente 1500. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes 11 de junho de 1558, em Rothwell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Holy Trinity Churchyard, South Crosland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Holy Trinity Churchyard, South Crosland,: холи тринити чурчярд, соут кросланд, еркшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lettice Peniston родилась в 1485 г. в местности харидж, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Peniston было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Bulstrode, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Lee около 1500 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 11 июнь 1558 г. в местности ротвелл, еркшир, Англия и была похоронена в местности холи тринити чурчярд, соут кросланд, еркшир, Англия.
